# San Juan Excursions

> San Juan Puerto Rico excursions, snorkeling, El Yunque, and old city tours by Mateo Rivera.

## Key Guides
- [Bio Bay Guide](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/bio-bay): Puerto Rico's bioluminescent bays explained
- [Best Bio Bay Tours](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/bio-bay/best-bio-bay-tours): Which bio bay tour to book
- [El Yunque Rainforest Guide](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/el-yunque): Complete guide to Puerto Rico's rainforest
- [Best El Yunque Tours](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/el-yunque/best-el-yunque-tours): Top-rated rainforest excursions
- [El Yunque Waterslide Comparison](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/el-yunque/waterslide-comparison): Natural waterslide tours compared
- [Old San Juan Guide](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/old-san-juan): Walking the historic city
- [Best Old San Juan Walking Tours](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/old-san-juan/best-walking-tours): Top-rated history walks
- [Snorkeling Guide](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/snorkeling): Best snorkeling spots near San Juan
- [Best Snorkeling Tours](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/snorkeling/best-snorkeling-tours): Top-rated snorkeling excursions
- [Turtle vs Reef Snorkeling](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/snorkeling/turtle-vs-reef-comparison): Which snorkeling experience to choose
- [Best Day Trips from San Juan](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/day-trips/best-day-trips): Top excursions beyond the city

## Planning
- [Trip Planning Guide](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/planning): Complete San Juan trip planner

## Optional
- [Home](https://www.san-juan-excursions.com/): San Juan Excursions home page
